title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.277 - Buy Missouri Week designated for the week beginning the second Saturday in October
text:
9.277.  Buy Missouri Week designated for the week beginning the second Saturday in October. — The week beginning the second Saturday in October is hereby designated as "Buy Missouri Week" in the state of Missouri and citizens are encouraged to observe the week with appropriate activities and events to support the men and women who create, produce, grow, manufacture, distribute, promote and sell goods made in Missouri.
(L. 2018 S.B. 891)
